Description: [3-Man] Drop incoming global mob damage to manageable levels
[3-Man] Boost player damage to burn down Axis boss health pools faster
[3-Man] Lower base Boss rank damage scaling

[Ultron] Despite the name, this region's native AccessDifficulties only granted Red (Heroic) access - confirmed live via a temporary ConstrainDifficulty trace: mask=Red for a Tier3Superheroic(Cosmic) request. Entering via !ultron/!difficulty's debug-teleport bypass skips this check on the way in, but the internal stage-3-to-boss-arena transition (TeleportContext_Transition) does not, silently downgrading to whatever's registered for Red (Tier2Heroic) and rejecting the re-queue attempt as "already in queue" against the real Tier3Superheroic InMatch entry. Appends Tier3Superheroic access (existing Tier2Heroic/Red entry untouched).
[Ultron] Same fix as the Tier3Superheroic entry above - appends Tier4Cosmic access so !ultron t4/!difficulty t4 stays consistent through the internal boss-arena transition too.
[Ultron] Same fix as the Tier3Superheroic entry above - appends Tier5Omega1 access so !ultron t5/!difficulty t5 stays consistent through the internal boss-arena transition too.
